tasks.label: Kill dev servers on 8000 3000 3001
tasks.command: $ports = @(8000,3000,3001); $pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($pid in $pids) { try { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Write-Output ('Killed PIDs: ' + ($pids -join ', '))

tasks.label: Kill dev servers v2
tasks.command: $ports = @(8000,3000,3001); $pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($pid in $pids) { try { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Write-Output ('Killed PIDs: ' + ($pids -join ', '))

tasks.label: Force kill dev ports clean
tasks.command: $ports = @(8000,3000,3001); $processIds = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($processId in $processIds) { try { Stop-Process -Id $processId -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Write-Output ('Killed PIDs: ' + ($processIds -join ', '))

tasks.label: Force kill ports 8000 8010 3000 3001
tasks.command: $ports = @(8000,8010,3000,3001); $processIds = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($processId in $processIds) { try { Stop-Process -Id $processId -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Write-Output ('Killed PIDs: ' + ($processIds -join ', '))

tasks.label: Probe doc view statuses
tasks.command: Set-Location "${workspaceFolder}"; & "${workspaceFolder}/.venv/Scripts/Activate.ps1"; python -c "import requests; ids=[1,3,6,7,25]; [print(i, (lambda r:(r.status_code, r.headers.get('content-type'), r.headers.get('x-doc-view-version')))(requests.get(f'http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/documents/view/{i}', params={'user_id':4}, timeout=30))) for i in ids]"

tasks.label: Kill ports after teacher page fix
tasks.command: $ports = @(8000,8010,3000,3001); $processIds = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($processId in $processIds) { try { Stop-Process -Id $processId -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Write-Output ('Killed PIDs: ' + ($processIds -join ', '))

tasks.label: Restart frontend 3000 after teacher fix
tasks.command: Set-Location "${workspaceFolder}/frontend"; Remove-Item -Force ".next/dev/lock" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run dev
